calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-17-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:18am
Judge Pro Tem Guy Kornblum, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, Da'mya Hodge and Gladys Peacock appear in pro per. Respondent, Debra Sanchez appears in pro per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Kornblum.

EXHR (A) Police Report
EXHR (B) Itemization of costs
EXHR (C) Kelly Blue Book printout
EXHR (D) Towing invoice
EXHA (1) Dental and ambulance invoices
EXHR (E) Notice of lien
EXHR (F) Documents from insurance company

9:46am Parties are encouraged to exit the courtroom and come to an agreement.

10:28am Parties have not come to an agreement, a google map is shown via cell phone to the Jugde for review.
10:30am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
